# PERF-114-interface negative: interface boxing requires a conversion loop; copy() cannot do this
lang: go
file: PERF-114-interface-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

// Run packs typed args into []interface{} for a variadic API.
// This is an element conversion, not a memmove copy.
func Run(args ...int64) []interface{} {
	argv := make([]interface{}, len(args))
	for i, arg := range args {
		argv[i] = arg
	}
	return argv
}
